feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red entered Rock Tunnel instead of jumping regions, keeping the Kanto path physical and dangerous.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red stayed close in the darkness and turned Rock Tunnel into a real companion survival beat.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill tracked the Echo Flute trace through Rock Tunnel toward Lavender, where the sleep signal is getting stronger.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight is using the cave darkness to amplify dream pressure and steer travelers away from the Lavender signal.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: A Rocket dark cache near the tunnel exit proves Giovanni's network is watching Team Moonlight's operation.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red flagged the Flash Lantern as the safer field-tool answer for deeper cave travel.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Lavender exit path is marked. The next Kanto beat can move toward the tower signal.
